metadata.name: Publish an Article to the CMS

description: An online editor needs to take a finalized article and publish it to the website using the content management system (CMS).

nodes.task_description: Copy the final text from a document and paste it into a new post in the CMS.

expected_outcome.value: The text is successfully transferred to the CMS.

nodes.task_description: Format the article with appropriate headings, subheadings, and hyperlinks.

expected_outcome.value: The article is properly formatted for web readability.

nodes.task_description: Add a featured image, relevant tags, and SEO-friendly metadata (meta title, meta description).

expected_outcome.value: All necessary metadata is added for discoverability.

nodes.task_description: Publish the article and verify that it appears correctly on the live website.

expected_outcome.value: The article is live and renders correctly for the public.
